ACO Strategic Planning Survey

This survey is confidential and accessible to invited participants only.

Australian College of Optometry

External Stakeholder Survey

ACO Strategic Direction 2027–2031

Thank you for taking the time to contribute to ACO's strategic planning process. As one of ACO's valued external partners, your perspective on the value ACO delivers and the conditions shaping the future of optometry is important to us.

This survey should take approximately 15–20 minutes to complete.

Your progress saves automatically. You can return to this form at any time from the same browser and device.

Your responses are confidential. Individual responses will not be attributed to specific respondents in any reporting. Results will be used solely for the purposes of ACO's 2027–2031 strategic planning process and only aggregated themes will be shared.

You do not need to answer every question. Please contribute where you feel you have relevant perspectives or experience. Any input you can provide is valuable. If you have any questions about this survey, please contact your ACO representative.

15–20 minutes Responses are confidential Progress saves automatically
— your previous answers have been restored.

Please answer all required questions (marked with *) before submitting.

Thank you for completing the survey.

Your responses have been recorded and will contribute to ACO's 2027–2031 strategic planning process. Only aggregated themes will be shared.
